notes: Much bigger distraction block-list. On top of the social sites, it now also blocks news (BBC, CNN, Guardian, news.com.au...), shopping (Amazon, eBay, Temu, Shein...), music (Spotify, SoundCloud...), LinkedIn, games (Steam, Roblox...), more video and chat, and adult sites. All bounced straight home. Want any one of them allowed back? Just say which.
